title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Shadowfax - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Shadowfax - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Shadowfax. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Distribution Manager to strengthen our Rajkot-based team.

About Shadowfax:
Shadowfax is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shadowfax!
